overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring the interior of a spacecraft. The character moves through the cockpit with forward viewport, narrow connecting corridors, and a control room with multiple computer terminals before approaching an airlock door.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship cockpit with pilot stations and forward viewport

events.description: character exits the cockpit through the side doorway into the connecting corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the spaceship cockpit past the pilot seats and control consoles toward the exit

notable_agents.action: seated in the pilot chair facing the forward viewport

entered.detail: two large pilot seats with headrests positioned in front of the control panels
large panoramic viewport showing barren planetary surface outside
array of illuminated control panels and displays mounted on the ceiling
computer terminals with glowing blue screens lining the side walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a spacecraft cockpit with a panoramic forward viewport showing an alien landscape. The character walks past an NPC seated at the pilot station and navigates between control consoles with glowing displays before exiting through a side doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow connecting corridor with padded walls

events.description: enters narrow corridor with padded walls and yellow cable conduits
approaches circular hatch doorway leading to the next section

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow connecting corridor toward the circular hatch

entered.detail: walls covered with padded cushion-like panels for safety
large circular doorway with metal frame connecting to the next room
thick yellow cable running along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow corridor with padded safety walls and visible cable conduits. The space is tight and enclosed, leading to a circular hatch doorway that provides access to the next section of the ship.

scene_state.functional_zone: operations center with multiple computer workstations

events.description: enters the control room with multiple computer stations and holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking down the central aisle between rows of computer workstations

entered.detail: rows of computer terminals with glowing green holographic displays
office chairs positioned at each workstation
floating blue-green holographic screens above the consoles
yellow and black safety stripes marking the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious operations center lined with computer consoles and holographic displays on both sides. The room features industrial design with caution stripes on the floor as the character walks down the central aisle toward the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to main airlock with large circular door

events.description: enters final corridor approaching the large circular airlock door
large circular airlock door begins to open with mechanical rotation

agents.ego_description: approaching the airlock door and stopping as the door mechanism activates and opens

entered.detail: massive circular metal door with rotating locking mechanism at the end of the corridor
industrial wall panels with visible piping and structural elements

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a final corridor toward a massive circular airlock door. As the character approaches, the door's locking mechanism rotates and the heavy metal door begins to open, revealing the chamber beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the panoramic openness of a spacecraft cockpit through restrictive corridors and into a sprawling operations center. It begins by navigating past a pilot and glowing control consoles beneath a wide viewport of an alien landscape before exiting through a side doorway. The scene then tightens as the camera moves through a narrow, padded corridor lined with cable conduits, eventually passing through a circular hatch. This enclosed space opens up into a spacious operations center filled with holographic displays and industrial floor markings, which the character traverses down a central aisle. Finally, the camera follows the path into a concluding corridor, ending as a massive circular airlock door rotates and slides open to reveal the chamber beyond.
